entries.notes: BTP Subaccount (maps 1:1 to a Cloud Foundry org). {region} is the BTP landscape code (eu10, us10, ap21). {subdomain} is the human-readable subaccount name. Subaccount GUID retrieved via: btp list accounts/subaccount.
BTP Cloud Foundry service instance. {service-instance-guid} is a UUID v4 retrieved via: cf service {name} --guid
Service binding (service key) for a BTP service instance. UUID v4 format.
Cloud Foundry application deployed in a BTP space. {app-guid} is UUID v4 retrieved via: cf app {name} --guid
Cloud Foundry space within a BTP subaccount. {space-guid} is UUID v4 retrieved via: cf space {name} --guid
BTP Destination Service configuration entry. {destination-name} is the human-readable destination name used in callouts.
SAP Authorization and Trust Management Service (XSUAA) instance on BTP. Provides OAuth 2.0 / OIDC token endpoint.
BTP Connectivity Service instance enabling on-premise connectivity via Cloud Connector.
S/4HANA company code (Buchungskreis). {object-id} is the 4-character company code (e.g. 1000). OData API: API_COMPANYCODE_SRV. {host} is the ABAP application server FQDN.
S/4HANA general ledger account. Compound key: chart of accounts + account number. OData API: API_GLACCOUNTINCHARTOFACCOUNTS_SRV.

S/4HANA cost center. Three-part compound key: ControllingArea + CostCenter + ValidityEndDate (time-dependency). OData API: API_COSTCENTER_SRV. Use ValidityEndDate='9999-12-31T00:00:00' for current/active records.

S/4HANA profit center. Three-part compound key: ControllingArea + ProfitCenter + ValidityEndDate (time-dependency). OData API: API_PROFITCENTER_SRV. Use ValidityEndDate='9999-12-31T00:00:00' for current/active records.
S/4HANA journal entry (accounting document). Compound key includes company code, fiscal year, document number, and line item. OData API: API_JOURNALENTRYITEMBASIC_SRV.
S/4HANA fiscal year variant configuration. OData API: API_FISCALYEARVARIANT_SRV.
S/4HANA supplier (vendor) master data. {object-id} is the business partner/supplier number. OData API: API_BUSINESS_PARTNER.

S/4HANA purchase order header. {object-id} is the 10-digit PO number. OData API: API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV. DEPRECATION: API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV was deprecated in SAP S/4HANA 2308; customers should migrate to the successor API (check SAP API Business Hub for the replacement service name for your release).
S/4HANA purchase order line item. Compound key: PO number + item number. OData API: API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV. DEPRECATION: See purchase_order entry — this API was deprecated in S/4HANA 2308.
S/4HANA purchase requisition header. {object-id} is the 10-digit PR number. OData API: API_PURCHASEREQ_PROCESS_SRV.
S/4HANA purchasing outline agreement (contract). OData API: API_PURCHASING_CONTRACT_SRV.
S/4HANA customer (sold-to party) master data. {object-id} is the business partner/customer number. OData API: API_BUSINESS_PARTNER.
S/4HANA sales order header. {object-id} is the 10-digit sales order number. OData API: API_SALES_ORDER_SRV.
S/4HANA sales order line item. Compound key: order number + item number. OData API: API_SALES_ORDER_SRV.
S/4HANA billing document (invoice, credit memo). {object-id} is the billing document number. OData API: API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV.
S/4HANA outbound delivery note. {object-id} is the 10-digit delivery number. OData API: API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV.
S/4HANA sales quotation (document category B). Uses the same API as sales orders; distinguish by SalesOrderType / SalesDocumentCategory field.
S/4HANA material master record. {object-id} is the material number (up to 18 chars). OData API: API_PRODUCT_SRV.
S/4HANA plant configuration. {object-id} is the 4-character plant code. OData API: API_PLANT_SRV.
S/4HANA storage location. Compound key: plant + storage location code. OData API: API_PLANT_SRV.
S/4HANA goods movement document. Compound key: document number + fiscal year. OData API: API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV.
S/4HANA batch master record. Compound key: material + plant + batch number. OData API: API_BATCH_SRV.
S/4HANA production order header. {object-id} is the 12-digit order number. OData API: API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV.
S/4HANA routing (bill of operations) header. OData API: API_ROUTING_SRV.
S/4HANA work center (production resource). OData API: API_WORK_CENTER_SRV.
S/4HANA bill of materials. Compound key across BOM number, category, variant, version, material, plant. OData API: API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_SRV.
S/4HANA Plant Maintenance equipment master. {object-id} is the equipment number. OData API: API_EQUIPMENT.
S/4HANA Plant Maintenance functional location (installation location of equipment). OData API: API_FUNCTIONALLOCATION.
S/4HANA Plant Maintenance order. {object-id} is the 12-digit PM order number. OData API: API_MAINTENANCEORDER.
S/4HANA project definition (PS module). {object-id} is the internal project number. OData API: API_PROJECT_SRV.
S/4HANA Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) element. {object-id} is the internal WBS element ID. OData API: API_PROJECT_SRV.
SAP SuccessFactors person record (global person). {object-id} is the personIdExternal. {api-server} is the data-center-specific hostname (e.g. api4, api8, api012) assigned at tenant provisioning.
SAP SuccessFactors employment record. Compound key: personIdExternal + userId. OData v2 API.

SAP SuccessFactors job information record (position, job role, etc.). Three-part compound key: userId + seqNumber (sequence number, typically 1 for primary assignment) + startDate (effective date). All three keys are required for a unique EmpJob record.
SAP SuccessFactors compensation info record. Compound key: userId + effective date.
SAP SuccessFactors position (headcount). {object-id} is the position code.
SAP SuccessFactors job code (job classification). {object-id} is the job code value.
SAP SuccessFactors department foundation object. {object-id} is the department external code.
SAP SuccessFactors division foundation object. {object-id} is the division external code.
SAP SuccessFactors business unit foundation object. {object-id} is the business unit external code.
SAP SuccessFactors performance review form header. {object-id} is the form data ID (numeric). OData v2 API.
SAP SuccessFactors goal record (Goal_1 is the default goal plan entity). {object-id} is the goal ID. The entity name varies if custom goal plans are configured.
SAP SuccessFactors succession management nominee. Compound key: nominee user ID + position ID.
SAP SuccessFactors Learning completion history record. Compound key: userId + completion date.

SAP Integration Suite (CPI) integration package. {object-id} is the package technical ID. {host} is the CPI tenant URL (e.g. {tenant-id}.it-cpi{NNN}.cfapps.{region}.hana.ondemand.com). API: SAP CPI OData API v1.
SAP Integration Suite (CPI) integration flow (iFlow) artifact. {object-id} is the iFlow technical ID. Version='active' retrieves the deployed version.
SAP Integration Suite deployed/runtime artifact. Represents the running state of a deployed iFlow.
